prompt.content:
You have access to the tables 'subscriber_plans' and 'loyalty_credits'.

Our retention team issued loyalty credits during January 2026, and finance wants to quantify the impact for subscribers who are under contract as of 2026-01-28. 

Define under contract as: 'contract_end_date' is NULL, an empty string (''), or 'contract_end_date' is on/after 2026-01-28.

Calculate the following metrics across all individual credit records for loyalty credits issued in January 2026 (2026-01-01 through 2026-01-31) to under-contract subscribers:

1. Total credit amount
2. Average credit amount
3. Maximum single credit amount
4. Minimum credit amount
5. Standard deviation of credit amounts (using n-1 denominator)

Round all values to 2 decimals.

Please use only SQLite queries to complete this entire analysis throughout all of its steps. Include your full SQLite query used for analysis as well as the requested results in the final output.

rubrics.name: Reports the total credit amount as 7700.80 +/- 0.05. (ver_3c8937e427f74913b7cf39bbf8f590a3)

messages.content: Reports the total credit amount as 7700.80 +/- 0.05.

rubrics.name: Reports the average credit amount (under-contract credits only) as 275.03 +/-... (ver_aa3eb87929ee4479aaaeb0b73bd35ab2)

messages.content: Reports the average credit amount (under-contract credits only) as 275.03 +/- 0.05.

rubrics.name: Reports the maximum single credit amount issued to an under-contract... (ver_ef9e9c46bf1b4487967a24ea88525035)

messages.content: Reports the maximum single credit amount issued to an under-contract subscriber as 2500.00 +/- 0.05 (acceptable range 248 to 252).

rubrics.name: Reports the minimum credit amount issued to an under-contract subscriber as... (ver_bfd61e610e624f079813ed25bddb7345)

messages.content: Reports the minimum credit amount issued to an under-contract subscriber as -50.00 +/- 0.05 (acceptable range -50.50 to -49.50).

rubrics.name: Reports the standard deviation of credit amounts for under-contract... (ver_284be98c0ead4f598c0c390d93021e50)

messages.content: Reports the standard deviation of credit amounts for under-contract subscribers (using n-1 denominator) as 517.01 +/- 0.05 (acceptable range 511.84 to 522.18).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
total_credit_amount  average_credit_amount  maximum_credit_amount  minimum_credit_amount  standard_deviation_credit_amount
              7700.8                 275.03                 2500.0                  -50.0                            517.01
```sql
WITH CleanCredits AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(credit_amount, '$', ''), 'USD', ''), ',', ''), ' ', '') AS REAL) AS amt
  FROM loyalty_credits
  WHERE credit_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-01-31'
    AND subscriber_id IN (
      SELECT subscriber_id FROM subscriber_plans
      WHERE contract_end_date IS NULL OR contract_end_date = '' OR contract_end_date >= '2026-01-28'
    )
),
Stats AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND(SUM(amt), 2) AS total_credit_amount,
    ROUND(AVG(amt), 2) AS average_credit_amount,
    ROUND(MAX(amt), 2) AS maximum_credit_amount,
    ROUND(MIN(amt), 2) AS minimum_credit_amount,
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(amt) AS mean_amt
  FROM CleanCredits
)
SELECT
  total_credit_amount,
  average_credit_amount,
  maximum_credit_amount,
  minimum_credit_amount,
  ROUND(
    SQRT(
      (SELECT SUM((amt - mean_amt) * (amt - mean_amt)) FROM CleanCredits, Stats) / (n - 1)
    ), 2
  ) AS standard_deviation_credit_amount
FROM Stats;
```
